sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I've used 34 actions already, which is over the target of 32. Let me check the current state and think about what the goal might be. The black F is now back near the top of the right panel, and the charcoal F is on the left panel. Let me check positions and think about what needs to happen.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
    maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
    minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
    maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{minr},{minc}]-[{maxr},{maxc}]")

# Let me also check the ascii around the black F and yellow F to see their relative positions
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Right panel area (rows 43-55, cols 35-60) ===")
for r in range(43, 56):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][35:61]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Row 16: W at cols 19, 22, 25 (3 dots in the top bar)
